title: The Fog Watches
description: Enter in a Corrupt Version Merged by the Old and New on Minecraft Where The Creatures Lure inside the Fog...
body:
**Imagine yourself in a Minecraft Old Version where everything is foggy and you don't know what lurks behind it.** _And you'll feel paranoid and watched by anything and everything.._  

_It includes:_ 
* **Hearing Sounds** 
* **Seeing Things** 
* **Feeling Observed** 
* **And more...**

Warning: This modpack is not getting updated anymore as I'm gonna focus on the CurseForge Version that'll be way better since modrinth has a lot of issues with copyright so yea if u want a better version of this with REAL danger just wait for me to get the modpack out there 

All The Credit goes towards the mod creators that made this modpack possible! And there might be a few bugs so i'm sorry in advance gonna try to correct them for the next versions or so. (also u are free to modify this modpack to your liking :>)
